infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GeoSnap needs camera access to capture geotagged photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GeoSnap needs microphone access to record video with audio.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoSnap uses your GPS location to geotag your photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GeoSnap saves your geotagged photos and videos to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GeoSnap needs access to your photo library to save geotagged media.

plugins.cameraPermission: GeoSnap needs camera access to capture geotagged photos and videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: GeoSnap needs microphone access to record video with audio.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoSnap uses your location to geotag photos and videos.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoSnap uses your location to geotag photos and videos.

plugins.photosPermission: GeoSnap saves your geotagged photos to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: GeoSnap saves your geotagged photos to your photo library.
